title: ekebergia pumila
intro: Ekebergia pumila, also known as the dwarf ivory nut tree, is a plant species in the family Meliaceae, native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been shown to have antimicrobial and antiparasitic effects. The health benefits of Ekebergia pumila include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through various methods, including infusion, decoction, and tincture, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
